title: Deepak 259% position-sizing overlay
rules_high_confidence: Position sizing: 1% portfolio risk per trade
Calculated stop distance → share count = portfolio*0.01/stop_distance
Cap stops at technical levels OR 8% generic, whichever tighter
known_strengths: Deterministic Spec — Deepak Singhania 259% Risk Overlay (QL_DEEPAK_259_RISK_OVERLAY)
known_weaknesses: Deterministic Spec — Deepak Singhania 259% Risk Overlay (QL_DEEPAK_259_RISK_OVERLAY). Overlay risk management system — not a standalone entry strategy.
